query_title: A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III

recommendations.title: Queen Margot
recommendations.overview: Paris, Kingdom of France, August 18, 1572. To avoid the outbreak of a religious war, the Catholic princess Marguerite de Valois, sister of the feeble King Charles IX, marries the Huguenot King Henry III of Navarre.

recommendations.title: The Lady Eve

recommendations.title: The Edge
recommendations.overview: The plane carrying wealthy Charles Morse crashes down in the Alaskan wilderness. Together with the two other passengers, photographer Robert and assistant Stephen, Charles devises a plan to help them reach civilization. However, his biggest obstacle

recommendations.title: Phantom of the Paradise
recommendations.overview: Singer-songwriter Winslow Leach seeks revenge on the nefarious music producer Swan, who steals both Winslow's music and his favorite singer for the grand opening of Swan's new rock palace, the Paradise.

recommendations.title: Grace of Monaco
recommendations.overview: The story of former Hollywood star Grace Kelly's crisis of marriage and identity, during a political dispute between Monaco's Prince Rainier III and France's Charles De Gaulle, and a looming French invasion of Monaco in the early 1960s.

recommendations.title: The Bitter Tears of Petra von Kant

recommendations.title: Citizen Kane

recommendations.title: Brian and Charles

recommendations.title: Prelude to a Kiss
recommendations.overview: A couple fall in love despite the girl's pessimistic outlook. As they struggle to come to terms with their relationship, something supernatural happens that tests it.
